fields.explainZh: 设备的管理控制器代码版本。

The health state of the disk.
MAC address, IP address, mask, and gateway of the interface.
I/O read rate of the disk array.

I/O rate of the disk array.

fields.explainZh: 磁盘阵列的数据传输速率。

fields.explainZh: 磁盘阵列的数据写入速率。

fields.explainZh: 存储池/虚拟磁盘的健康情况。

ID of the storage pool or virtual disk.

Specifies whether the storage volume is initialized.
